analysis.metric_interpretation: Confirm/falsify is gated to >=2 same-composition groups with >=5 distinct cooling rates. Composition series at fixed cooling rate are diagnostic only; edge GB-density minima still do not prove an optimum cooling rate.

falsification_logic.confirm_like: At least two same-composition public datasets with >=5 distinct cooling rates each fit alpha within 10-15% of 3D Ising Kibble-Zurek alpha≈0.277 and show an interior GB-density minimum.
falsification_logic.data_limited: Open literature text supports cooling-rate scaling, but extracted data are too few/mixed to be decisive.
falsification_logic.data_limited_negative: Diagnostic 3-point fits lean away from the target exponent, but evidence is too thin for decisive falsification.
falsification_logic.falsify_like: Adequate same-material open data give exponents far outside the 10-15% window or no consistent optimum.
falsification_logic.partial_exponent_only: Exponent criterion passes but no interior GB-density optimum is shown.

test_name: Kibble-Zurek cooling-rate exponent and GB-density proxy from public literature
